title: fraxinus excelsior var. communis
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. communis, also known as the common ash tree, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and easing respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Fraxinus excelsior var. communis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be easily harnessed.
